key_risks: Hotter-than-expected CPI release on July 14 pressuring rate-sensitive holdings
Adverse surprise in July 2 employment report or July FOMC outcome
Reversal in recent healthcare and biotech momentum before exit close
Geopolitical developments affecting energy and broader risk appetite

portfolio.rationale: Strong 30-day outperformance with supportive macro expansion signals from PMI and GDP data.
Leading recent returns amid positive manufacturing and services activity readings.
Benefiting from flash PMI strength and solid economic activity indicators.
Domestic growth exposure aligned with low claims and consumption data.
Defensive tilt to navigate elevated inflation and upcoming data releases.

portfolio_rationale: Concentrate in healthcare, biotech, and industrials to capture recent sector strength and positive PMI/GDP momentum over the one-month window ending before the July FOMC.
rationale_summary: Prioritize areas with documented recent outperformance and macro support from expansionary PMI and solid growth readings while maintaining a defensive component.
